pages.text: My friends and I have a game we like to play. “There’s a fire on the mountain. Run, run! Kukh’umlilo kwezontaba. Baleka, baleka!”

blocks.text: My friends and I have a game we like to play.
“There’s a fire on the mountain. Run, run! Kukh’umlilo kwezontaba. Baleka, baleka!”

pages.text: Then one day there was a real fire on the mountain. It was a terrible fire that burned and burned.

blocks.text: Then one day there was a real fire on the mountain. It was a terrible fire that burned and burned.

pages.text: Big, old buildings burned, books burned, trees and grasses burned. Helicopters tipped water onto the fire and brave firefighters blasted their hoses.

blocks.text: Big, old buildings burned, books burned, trees and grasses burned. Helicopters tipped water onto the fire and brave firefighters blasted their hoses.

pages.text: And people did run. They grabbed their books and bags and ran away from the smoke and the flames.

blocks.text: And people did run. They grabbed their books and bags and ran away from the smoke and the flames.

pages.text: After three long days, the last flames were out. The firefighters could finally rest.

blocks.text: After three long days, the last flames were out.

pages.text: The slopes of the mountain were black. When we walked on the mountain, all we could see were rocks and burnt bushes. We were very sad.

blocks.text: The slopes of the mountain were black. When we walked on the mountain, all we could see were rocks and burnt bushes.

pages.text: Until one day … tiny bits of red popped up through the black. “Look, look. What is that?”

blocks.text: Until one day … tiny bits of red popped up through the black.

pages.text: The little bits of red grew and grew until they became beautiful fire lilies, tall and elegant with drooping red bells for flowers.

blocks.text: The little bits of red grew and grew until they became beautiful fire lilies, tall and elegant with drooping red bells for flowers.

pages.text: Then came the big, red flowers bursting through the green like volcanoes. They looked like thick red tubes with yellow- topped spikes and big, red petals. Dots of green grew up all over the mountainside, turning the black into green grasses and restios.

blocks.text: Then came the big, red flowers bursting through the green like volcanoes. They looked like thick red tubes with yellow- topped spikes and big, red petals.
Dots of green grew up all over the mountainside, turning the black into green grasses and restios.

And the tall in watsonia orange and pink.

pages.text: Soon the mountainside was covered with plants we hadn’t seen for years.

blocks.text: Soon the mountainside was covered with plants we hadn’t seen for years.

pages.text: The mountain is full of new life!

blocks.text: The mountain is full of new life!
